creator: akruijff@dds.nl
text:
I've corrected a stack overflow problem in the new code. I've added a
 new patch file for 1.6.
 
 --- samesame.diff begins here ---
 diff port.orig/Makefile port/Makefile
 8c8
 < PORTVERSION=  1.5
 ---
 > PORTVERSION=  1.6
 34d33
 <		LOGIC "Determine results by using logic when posible" On
 \
 45,48d43
 < .endif
 <
 < .if defined(WITHOUT_LOGIC)
 < CONFIGURE_ARGS+=      --disable-logic
 diff port.orig/distinfo port/distinfo
 1,3c1,3
 < MD5 (samesame-1.5.tar.bz2) = 5443c04b1d9c624f4aff39b5acaa38ef
 < SHA256 (samesame-1.5.tar.bz2) =
 e91a94d05a23b378269d6408d3f3102f3216a47a4d0408
 013ac124dc65796e54
 < SIZE (samesame-1.5.tar.bz2) = 109837
 ---
 > MD5 (samesame-1.6.tar.bz2) = 6fc41e6938d12311458200538d29f242
 > SHA256 (samesame-1.6.tar.bz2) =
 > 336c4ebbd960f3d81e1e154e80e19fc1e61e2eb85799b8
 968dced596e0779b5a
 > SIZE (samesame-1.6.tar.bz2) = 109799
 Common subdirectories: port.orig/files and port/files
 --- samesame.diff ends here ---
